name: method
value: Use this packet as a wind-field and gust-response handoff. The Dryden rows check low-altitude turbulence intensity and filter shape; the ICAS rows show direct rotor CT changes under gust direction. Do not collapse deterministic dirty-air burble, atmospheric Dryden turbulence, and rotor inflow CT perturbation into one coefficient.
